mapper.update: UPDATE MAIN_BANNER SET DISPLAY_ORDER = DISPLAY_ORDER +1, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE DISPLAY_ORDER >= #{displayOrder}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MAIN_BANNER( BANNER_ID, TITLE, SUB_TITLE, IMAGE_URL, LINK_URL, DISPLAY_ORDER, ACTIVE_YN, START_AT, END_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( MAIN_BANNER_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{displayOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{activeYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{startAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT BANNER_ID, TITLE, SUB_TITLE, IMAGE_URL, LINK_URL, DISPLAY_ORDER, ACTIVE_YN, START_AT, END_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM MAIN_BANNER ORDER BY DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, BANNER_ID ASC

SELECT BANNER_ID, TITLE, SUB_TITLE, IMAGE_URL, LINK_URL, DISPLAY_ORDER, ACTIVE_YN, START_AT, END_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM MAIN_BANNER WHERE ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' AND ( START_AT IS NULL OR START_AT <= LOCALTIMESTAMP ) AND ( END_AT IS NULL OR END_AT >= LOCALTIMESTAMP ) ORDER BY DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, BANNER_ID ASC
SELECT BANNER_ID, TITLE, SUB_TITLE, IMAGE_URL, LINK_URL, DISPLAY_ORDER, ACTIVE_YN, START_AT, END_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM MAIN_BANNER WHERE BANNER_ID = #{bannerId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE MAIN_BANNER
SET TITLE = #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SUB_TITLE = #{subTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMAGE_URL = #{imageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LINK_URL = #{linkUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DISPLAY_ORDER = #{displayOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ACTIVE_YN = #{activeYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, START_AT = #{startAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, END_AT = #{endAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE BANNER_ID = #{bannerId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
